description: Collapses expression values from multiple input ids that map to a single target gene to a single value on a per-sample basis
author: Aravind Subramanian, Josh Gould, David Eby; Broad Institute
plan:
## CollapseDataset GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
CollapseDataset is a GenePattern module that Collapses expression values from multiple input ids that map to a single target gene to a single value on a per-sample basis

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 6 parameters:
- Required: dataset.file, collapse.mode, output.file.name, omit.features.with.no.symbol.match, dev.mode
- Optional: chip.platform

### 3. Command Line
```
/opt/gsea/GSEA_4.3.2/gsea-cli.sh CollapseDataset -res <dataset.file> -chip <chip.platform> -mode <collapse.mode> -dev_mode <dev.mode> -include_only_symbols <omit.features.with.no.symbol.match> <output.file.name> -run_as_genepattern true
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: genepattern/gsea_4.3.2\:0.1

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: chip.platform
parameters.description: DNA Chip (array) annotation file from GSEA website.  Upload your own chip file if the one corresponding to your DNA Microarray platform is not listed in the drop-down menu.  A chip file is only required if collapse dataset is set to true.

parameters.name: collapse.mode
parameters.description: Collapsing mode.  It is also possible to remap symbols from one namespace to another without collapsing (an error will occur if multiple source genes map to a single destination gene)

parameters.name: omit.features.with.no.symbol.match
parameters.description: If there is no known gene symbol match for a probe set, omit it from the collapsed dataset
